action.reasoning: Observation: Boost2 training shows excellent results: FourRooms 0.94, KeyCorridor 0.98, UnlockPickup 1.0, LavaCrossing 1.0, DoorKey 1.0 (all on training rollouts). These checkpoints went to checkpoints_boost2/. I need to merge them into checkpoints/ and re-eval. Time: 1.59h, 15 iters. Analysis: Expected SR boost from 0.642: gains ~+0.08 (FourRooms 0.86→0.94), +0.14 (KeyCorridor 0.84→0.98), +0.18 (UnlockPickup 0.82→1.0), tiny LavaCrossing/DoorKey. Total per-env improvements / 10 envs * fraction → expected eval ~0.68-0.72. Decision: Copy boost2 .best.zip files to checkpoints/.zip, then submit eval.
